summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Phase U1+U2 refactor (sealed uploadItems.js module). Verified behavior-preserving refactor for production /add flow. Single upload, multi-photo (3 images), and bulk upload (7 images) all working with per-card UI. CRITICAL: No aggregate progress UI for bulk uploads (regression test passed). Lightweight per-card editor confirmed (heavy editors removed). DPP scanner button functional. Minor issues: Save All navigation timing, some cards taking longer to analyze.

integration_issues.issue: After clicking Save All during bulk upload (7 images → 15 cards), page did not navigate to /closet. Some cards were still analyzing for extended period (166s+)
integration_issues.note: The pendingAutoSave mechanism should queue the save and auto-navigate once all cards complete. Needs investigation of why some cards took 166s+ to analyze.

passed_tests: ✓ Single photo upload (1 image → 2 cards via multi-garment detection)
✓ Multi-photo upload (3 images → 6 cards, parallel analysis in ~27s)
✓ Bulk upload (7 images → 15 cards, per-card UI for all)
✓ CRITICAL: No aggregate progress UI for bulk uploads (regression test passed)
✓ Per-card UI is lightweight: name + caption + intent + price fields only
✓ Heavy editors ABSENT: No TaxonomyGrid, WeightedList, QualityRow, SeasonPicker, TagsEditor on /add
✓ Edit-later hint present: 'Category, colour, size and more — fine-tune anytime from the item page.'
✓ NDJSON streaming analysis works (multi-garment split)
✓ Save All button works for single and multi-photo uploads
✓ Navigation to /closet after save (single and multi-photo)
✓ WorkProgressFloater visible during analysis ('Analysing N photo')
✓ Polishing workflow visible in /closet ('Polishing 0/N photos')
✓ DPP Scanner button opens dialog correctly
✓ Pre-flight duplicate detection works (dialog appeared for known duplicates)
✓ Duplicate dialog shows existing item details with Skip/Add anyway options
✓ Intent selector works (Keep, For sale, Donate, Swap)
✓ Toast notifications appear ('Detected N item(s)')
✓ Cards show detected labels (e.g., 'Upper_clothes', 'Dress', 'Pants')
✓ Analysis progress bars update smoothly
✓ Remove card button works (X button on cards)

single_upload.notes: Multi-garment detection worked (1 image → 2 garments). Lightweight UI confirmed. Navigated to /closet after save.

multi_photo_upload.notes: Parallel analysis of 3 images. All cards showed per-card UI. Saved successfully and navigated to /closet.

bulk_upload.notes: CRITICAL TEST PASSED: No aggregate progress UI. All cards used per-card UI. Save All did not navigate to /closet (cards still analyzing). Needs investigation of slow analysis.

lightweight_ui.notes: Phase U2 design constraint verified: only lightweight inline edits on /add.

dpp_scanner.notes: Button opens dialog correctly. Dialog shows Camera/Upload image options. Expected 'device not found' in headless browser.

duplicate_detection.notes: Pre-flight dialog appeared in early tests for known duplicates (0001.jpg). Later test did not trigger dialog (closet state may have changed). Mechanism is working.

polishing_workflow.notes: WorkProgressFloater visible during analysis. 'Polishing 0/N photos' visible in /closet after save.

investigate.task: Bulk upload Save All navigation timing
investigate.details: When Save All is clicked during bulk upload with some cards still analyzing, the page should queue the save (pendingAutoSave=true) and auto-navigate to /closet once all complete. In the 7-image test, navigation did not occur. Some cards took 166s+ to analyze. Investigate: (1) Why some cards analyze slowly, (2) Whether pendingAutoSave drain is working correctly, (3) Whether onBatchSettled fires when expected.

manual_verification.details: GET /api/v1/closet/items after bulk upload and verify saved items have non-null source_sha256, source_phash, source_color_sig, source_filename, source_size_bytes. This was verified in iteration_25 at code level but not end-to-end in UI.

Upload multiple files that are all duplicates, click 'Skip all duplicates' in pre-flight dialog, verify: (1) NO navigation to /closet, (2) Toast 'All selected photos were duplicates and were skipped.' appears, (3) No cards remain on /add page.
Start a 6-photo upload, immediately navigate to /home, verify WorkProgressFloater pill shows 'Analysing N/M' from the floater. Return to /closet and verify items appear as they save.

manual_verification.task: Test Save All 'waiting for analysis' state
manual_verification.details: Upload 3-5 images, click Save All while cards are still scanning, verify button shows 'Saving — waiting for analysis…' text and is disabled.

success_percentage.overall: 95% (major refactor successful, minor navigation timing issue)

reason: The Phase U1+U2 refactor is behavior-preserving and working correctly. The sealed uploadItems.js module successfully handles single, multi-photo, and bulk uploads with per-card UI. The critical regression test (no aggregate UI for bulk) passed. The minor navigation timing issue during bulk upload needs investigation but does not block the refactor. Main agent can verify the specific edge cases (Save All timing, cross-page persistence) and confirm fingerprint persistence end-to-end.
